/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libtechx_vision_bridge__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libtechx_vision_bridge__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/techx_vision_bridge__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/techx_vision_bridge/msg/target3_d__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/xie/techx_R2_algorithm/techx_vision_brige/build/techx_vision_bridge:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libtechx_vision_bridge__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
